chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2990 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing 1. For order on office objections 1 to 4. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 18.08.2025 Mr. Muhammad Nawaz Kubar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. K.A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Raza Mian, DSP Legal-II, CPO, Karachi. PI Altaf Ahmed, KPO Legal Branch on behalf of Addl. I.G, Karachi. SIP Fida Hussain, P.S Maripur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The case of the petitioner is that his son was murdered while in police uniform and an FIR No.265/2024 was registered at Police Station Maripur, whereas, the Department has not declared him as Shaheed. Though the widow of Shaheed has moved several applications for the same relief but the same are not yet decided (applications and postal receipts are available at Page-43 to 99). The benefits have not yet been released in favour of the family of Shaheed. Learned A.A.G. submits that a committee has already been constituted to decide the like nature cases. He raised no objection on disposal of this petition by directing the respondents to decide the same in accordance with law. Under the circumstances, by consent this petition is disposed of with direction to the Inspector General Police Sindh to constitute a committee (if not already in existence), to decide the case of the petitioner in accordance with the existing Policy and the Rules, after hearing the parties, within thirty days from today. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
